summary: Machine learning-based methods show improved performance over statistical methods in specific clinical scenarios such as acute pancreatitis and post-treatment prognosis by enabling better risk stratification through pattern recognition from complex data sets. These advantages stem from ML’s capacity to handle high-dimensional data and uncover non-linear relationships not easily captured by standard statistical approaches.
